# Darshan Bhamare

> Cloud Operations, DevOps, SRE, and Platform Engineer. Portfolio includes multi-cloud delivery, infrastructure automation, and reliability engineering projects.

## About

- Name: Darshan Bhamare
- Role: Senior Cloud Engineer / Cloud Operations / DevOps / SRE
- Location: United Kingdom | India | Remote | Relocation
- Availability: Open to full-time and contract opportunities

## Core Skills

- AWS, Azure, Kubernetes (EKS/AKS/IKS)
- Terraform, Ansible, Helm, Jenkins
- CloudWatch, incident response, reliability engineering
- Linux/Windows operations, infrastructure security

## Featured Projects

- Multi-Cloud Microservices CI/CD Pipeline
- Infrastructure as Code (IaC) Automation & Self-Healing Network
- Centralized Observability and Incident Reduction Platform
